---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# momentum estimate

* get shadows of subsystem

```{julia}
# calibration 
using NPZ
calibration_data = npzread("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/c_post_processing/classicalshadow/calibration.npz")
calibration_vec = calibration_data["calibration"]
```

```{julia}
# product shadows of subsystem.
using RandomMeas
N = 4
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit", N);
measurement_group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
subrange = [1, 2];
subgroup = reduce_to_subsystem(measurement_group, subrange);
sub_dense_shadows = get_dense_shadows(subgroup, G=calibration_vec[subrange]);
```

## get estimate of op

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
sites = siteinds("Qubit", 10)
os = OpSum() 
os += "I", 1
my_op = MPO(os, sites)
gates = [
    op("SWAP", sites[1], sites[10]),
    op("SWAP", sites[2], sites[9]),
]
H = apply(gates, my_op; cutoff=1e-4)
linkdims(H)
```
